buildNote.zh: 夜报 · 今晚重点 · 蓝牙试用 · 有线校准
buildNote.en: Night report · focus loop · bluetooth trial · wired calibration

downloadSub.zh: Mac 桌面版已更新至 v0.3.4 · 夜报 / 蓝牙体验 / 有线升级
downloadSub.en: Mac desktop build updated to v0.3.4 · reports / bluetooth trial / wired upgrade

zh: 完整夜报：支持 severity、bucket、clip 预览与昨夜对比。
低门槛上手：先支持手机直出和蓝牙体验，再引导到有线路径。
增强链路：有线校准、今晚重点跟进、次日 follow-up 已接通。
en: Full night reports with severity, buckets, clip previews, and next-night follow-up.
Lower-friction onboarding with phone speaker and bluetooth trial before a wired upgrade.
Enhanced path now includes wired calibration, tonight focus, and follow-up loops.
